item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-06)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 40902 Trending skills: 16572 Hot skills: 2894 Top All Time: find-skills (423498) Top Trending: find-skills (14843) Top Hot: fun-brainstorming (801)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#10): baoyu-translate
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #10 Installs: 29 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Translates articles and documents between languages with three modes - quick (direct), normal (analyze then translate), and refined (analyze, translate, review, polish). Supports custom glossaries and terminology consistency via EXTEND.md. Use when user asks to "translate", "翻译", "精翻", "translate article", "translate to Chinese/English", "改成中文", "改成英文", "convert to Chinese", "localize", "本地化", or needs any document translation. Also triggers for "refined translation", "精细翻译", "proofread translation", "快速翻译", "快翻", "这篇文章翻译一下", or when a URL or file is provided with translation intent.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#14): python-executor
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #14 Installs: 66 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Execute Python code in a safe sandboxed environment via [inference.sh](https://inference.sh). Pre-installed: NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, requests, BeautifulSoup, Selenium, Playwright, MoviePy, Pillow, OpenCV, trimesh, and 100+ more libraries. Use for: data processing, web scraping, image manipulation, video creation, 3D model processing, PDF generation, API calls, automation scripts. Triggers: python, execute code, run script, web scraping, data analysis, image processing, video editing, 3D models, automation, pandas, matplotlib

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#29): optimize
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #29 Installs: 25 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Improve interface performance across loading speed, rendering, animations, images, and bundle size. Makes experiences faster and smoother.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#30): teach-impeccable
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #30 Installs: 25 Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: One-time setup that gathers design context for your project and saves it to your AI config file. Run once to establish persistent design guidelines.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#31): javascript-sdk
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #31 Installs: 55 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for inference.sh - run AI apps, build agents, integrate 150+ models. Package: @inferencesh/sdk (npm install). Full TypeScript support, streaming, file uploads. Build agents with template or ad-hoc patterns, tool builder API, skills, human approval. Use for: JavaScript integration, TypeScript, Node.js, React, Next.js, frontend apps. Triggers: javascript sdk, typescript sdk, npm install, node.js api, js client, react ai, next.js ai, frontend sdk, @inferencesh/sdk, typescript agent, browser sdk, js integration

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#32): app-store-screenshots
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #32 Installs: 35 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: App Store and Google Play screenshot creation with exact platform specs. Covers iOS/Android dimensions, gallery ordering, device mockups, and preview videos. Use for: app store optimization, ASO, app screenshots, app preview, play store listing. Triggers: app store screenshots, aso, app store optimization, play store screenshots, app preview, app listing, ios screenshots, android screenshots, app store images, app mockup, device mockup, app gallery, store listing

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#33): google-veo
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #33 Installs: 34 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Generate videos with Google Veo models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Veo 3.1, Veo 3.1 Fast, Veo 3, Veo 3 Fast, Veo 2. Capabilities: text-to-video, cinematic output, high quality video generation. Triggers: veo, google veo, veo 3, veo 2, veo 3.1, vertex ai video, google video generation, google video ai, veo model, veo video

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#34): systematic-debugging
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #34 Installs: 63 Source: obra/superpowers Description: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): social-media-carousel
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 32 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Multi-slide carousel design for Instagram, LinkedIn, and Twitter/X with layout rules and hooks. Covers slide structure, text hierarchy, swipe psychology, and platform-specific specs. Use for: carousel posts, Instagram carousels, LinkedIn carousels, slide posts, educational content. Triggers: carousel, instagram carousel, linkedin carousel, slide post, carousel design, swipe post, multi-image post, carousel template, educational carousel, carousel content, instagram slides, linkedin slides

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#36): python-sdk
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 74 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Python SDK for inference.sh - run AI apps, build agents, and integrate with 150+ models. Package: inferencesh (pip install inferencesh). Supports sync/async, streaming, file uploads. Build agents with template or ad-hoc patterns, tool builder API, skills, and human approval. Use for: Python integration, AI apps, agent development, RAG pipelines, automation. Triggers: python sdk, inferencesh, pip install, python api, python client, async inference, python agent, tool builder python, programmatic ai, python integration, sdk python

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): baoyu-article-illustrator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 38 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Analyzes article structure, identifies positions requiring visual aids, generates illustrations with Type × Style two-dimension approach. Use when user asks to "illustrate article", "add images", "generate images for article", or "为文章配图".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): vercel-composition-patterns
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 86 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: React composition patterns that scale. Use when refactoring components with boolean prop proliferation, building flexible component libraries, or designing reusable APIs. Triggers on tasks involving compound components, render props, context providers, or component architecture.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): skill-creator
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 149 Source: anthropics/skills Description: Guide for creating effective skills. This skill should be used when users want to create a new skill (or update an existing skill) that extends Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, or tool integrations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): dialogue-audio
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 37 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Multi-speaker dialogue audio creation with Dia TTS. Covers speaker tags, emotion control, pacing, conversation flow, and post-production. Use for: podcasts, audiobooks, explainers, character dialogue, conversational content. Triggers: dialogue audio, multi speaker, conversation audio, dia tts, two speakers, podcast audio, character voices, voice acting, dialogue generation, conversation tts, multi voice, speaker tags, dialogue recording

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): landing-page-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 34 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Landing page conversion optimization with layout rules, hero section design, and CTA psychology. Covers above-the-fold formula, social proof placement, mobile design, and F-pattern reading. Use for: startup landing pages, product pages, SaaS marketing, conversion optimization. Triggers: landing page, hero section, above the fold, conversion optimization, landing page design, cta button, hero image, landing page layout, saas landing page, product page design, conversion rate, landing page best practices

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#45): baoyu-cover-image
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 34 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Generates article cover images with 5 dimensions (type, palette, rendering, text, mood) combining 9 color palettes and 6 rendering styles. Supports cinematic (2.35:1), widescreen (16:9), and square (1:1) aspects. Use when user asks to "generate cover image", "create article cover", "make cover", or mentions "封面图".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): baoyu-infographic
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 34 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Generates professional infographics with 20 layout types and 17 visual styles. Analyzes content, recommends layout×style combinations, and generates publication-ready infographics. Use when user asks to create "infographic", "信息图", "visual summary", or "可视化".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): og-image-design
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 33 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Open Graph and social sharing image design with platform specs, text placement, and branding. Covers OG meta tags, Twitter cards, LinkedIn previews, and dynamic generation. Use for: social sharing images, blog thumbnails, link previews, social cards. item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 151 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: Review UI code for Web Interface Guidelines compliance. Use when asked to "review my UI", "check accessibility", "audit design", "review UX", or "check my site against best practices".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): speech-to-text
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 41 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Transcribe audio to text with Whisper models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Fast Whisper Large V3, Whisper V3 Large. Capabilities: transcription, translation, multi-language, timestamps. Use for: meeting transcription, subtitles, podcast transcripts, voice notes. Triggers: speech to text, transcription, whisper, audio to text, transcribe audio, voice to text, stt, automatic transcription, subtitles generation, transcribe meeting, audio transcription, whisper ai

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): ai-avatar-video
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 38 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Create AI avatar and talking head videos with OmniHuman, Fabric, PixVerse via inference.sh CLI. Models: OmniHuman 1.5, OmniHuman 1.0, Fabric 1.0, PixVerse Lipsync. Capabilities: audio-driven avatars, lipsync videos, talking head generation, virtual presenters. Use for: AI presenters, explainer videos, virtual influencers, dubbing, marketing videos. item.title: [Hot] New entry (#9): agent-ui
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #9 Installs: 74 Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Batteries-included agent component for React/Next.js from ui.inference.sh. One component with runtime, tools, streaming, approvals, and widgets built in. Capabilities: drop-in agent, human-in-the-loop, client-side tools, form filling. Use for: building AI chat interfaces, agentic UIs, SaaS copilots, assistants. Triggers: agent component, agent ui, chat agent, shadcn agent, react agent, agentic ui, ai assistant ui, copilot ui, inference ui, human in the loop

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#49): ui-ux-pro-max
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 1367 Source: nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill Description: UI/UX design intelligence. 50 styles, 21 palettes, 50 font pairings, 20 charts, 9 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app, .html, .tsx, .vue, .svelte. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient. Integrations: shadcn/ui MCP for component search and examples.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#50): vercel-react-native-skills
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 1270 Source: vercel-labs/agent-skills Description: React Native and Expo best practices for building performant mobile apps. Use when building React Native components, optimizing list performance, implementing animations, or working with native modules. Triggers on tasks involving React Native, Expo, mobile performance, or native platform APIs.

item.title: [All Time] Rank down (8 → 9): azure-cost-optimization
item.description: All Time leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #8 Current rank: #9 Delta: -1 Installs: 112167 (prev 111376) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Identify and quantify cost savings across Azure subscriptions by analyzing actual costs, utilization metrics, and generating actionable optimization recommendations. USE FOR: optimize Azure costs, reduce Azure spending, reduce Azure expenses, analyze Azure costs, find cost savings, generate cost optimization report, find orphaned resources, rightsize VMs, cost analysis, reduce waste, Azure spending analysis, find unused resources, optimize Redis costs. DO NOT USE FOR: deploying resources (use azure-deploy), general Azure diagnostics (use azure-diagnostics), security issues (use azure-security)

item.title: [All Time] Rank up (9 → 8): azure-deploy
item.description: All Time leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #9 Current rank: #8 Delta: +1 Installs: 112167 (prev 111374) Source: microsoft/github-copilot-for-azure Description: Execute deployment to Azure. Final step after preparation and validation. Runs azd up, azd deploy, or infrastructure provisioning commands. USE FOR: run azd up, run azd deploy, execute deployment, provision infrastructure, push to production, go live, ship it, deploy web app, deploy container app, deploy static site, deploy Azure Functions, bicep deploy, terraform apply. DO NOT USE FOR: creating or building apps (use azure-prepare), validating before deploy (use azure-validate).

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (11 → 40): claude-to-im
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #11 Current rank: #40 Delta: -29 Installs: 17 (prev 36) Source: op7418/claude-to-im-skill Description: This skill bridges Claude Code to IM platforms (Telegram, Discord, Feishu/Lark). It should be used when the user wants to start a background daemon that forwards IM messages to Claude Code sessions, or manage that daemon's lifecycle. Trigger on: "claude-to-im", "start bridge", "stop bridge", "bridge status", "查看日志", "启动桥接", "停止桥接", or any mention of IM bridge management. Subcommands: setup, start, stop, status, logs, reconfigure, doctor.

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (14 → 42): web-search
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #14 Current rank: #42 Delta: -28 Installs: 62 (prev 58) Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Web search and content extraction with Tavily and Exa via inference.sh CLI. item.title: [Hot] Rank up (10 → 2): twitter-automation
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #10 Current rank: #2 Delta: +8 Installs: 506 (prev 377) Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Automate Twitter/X with posting, engagement, and user management via inference.sh CLI. item.title: [Hot] Rank up (33 → 21): adapt
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #33 Current rank: #21 Delta: +12 Installs: 25 (prev 23) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Adapt designs to work across different screen sizes, devices, contexts, or platforms. Ensures consistent experience across varied environments.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (34 → 24): frontend-design
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #34 Current rank: #24 Delta: +10 Installs: 25 (prev 23) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, artifacts, posters, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (36 → 18): distill
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #36 Current rank: #18 Delta: +18 Installs: 26 (prev 23) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Strip designs to their essence by removing unnecessary complexity. Great design is simple, powerful, and clean.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (39 → 22): bolder
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #39 Current rank: #22 Delta: +17 Installs: 25 (prev 22) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Amplify safe or boring designs to make them more visually interesting and stimulating. Increases impact while maintaining usability.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (40 → 23): quieter
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #40 Current rank: #23 Delta: +17 Installs: 25 (prev 22) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Tone down overly bold or visually aggressive designs. Reduces intensity while maintaining design quality and impact.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (41 → 12): audit
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #41 Current rank: #12 Delta: +29 Installs: 27 (prev 22) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Perform comprehensive audit of interface quality across accessibility, performance, theming, and responsive design. Generates detailed report of issues with severity ratings and recommendations.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (42 → 15): animate
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #42 Current rank: #15 Delta: +27 Installs: 26 (prev 22) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Review a feature and enhance it with purposeful animations, micro-interactions, and motion effects that improve usability and delight.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (43 → 16): polish
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #43 Current rank: #16 Delta: +27 Installs: 26 (prev 22) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Final quality pass before shipping. Fixes alignment, spacing, consistency, and detail issues that separate good from great.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (44 → 17): delight
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #44 Current rank: #17 Delta: +27 Installs: 26 (prev 22) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Add moments of joy, personality, and unexpected touches that make interfaces memorable and enjoyable to use. Elevates functional to delightful.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (45 → 25): extract
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #45 Current rank: #25 Delta: +20 Installs: 25 (prev 22) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Extract and consolidate reusable components, design tokens, and patterns into your design system. Identifies opportunities for systematic reuse and enriches your component library.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (46 → 13): harden
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. item.title: [Hot] Rank up (47 → 19): colorize
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #47 Current rank: #19 Delta: +28 Installs: 26 (prev 22) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Add strategic color to features that are too monochromatic or lack visual interest. Makes interfaces more engaging and expressive.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (48 → 27): clarify
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #48 Current rank: #27 Delta: +21 Installs: 25 (prev 22) Source: pbakaus/impeccable Description: Improve unclear UX copy, error messages, microcopy, labels, and instructions. Makes interfaces easier to understand and use.

item.title: [Hot] Rank up (7 → 5): remotion-render
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #7 Current rank: #5 Delta: +2 Installs: 431 (prev 380) Source: tul-sh/skills Description: Render videos from React/Remotion component code via inference.sh. Pass TSX code, get MP4.
